channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sowah misses Simba U-20 training session after returning to squad
item.description: After being reinstated to the Simba U-20 squad, Sowah did not show up for training as expected. His absence has sparked curiosity among fans and sports followers, since reinstatement usually signals a...

item.title: Gachagua Seeks Supreme Court Ruling to Maintain High Court Impeachment Bench
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has approached the Supreme Court aiming to dismiss an appeal challenging the composition of the High Court bench handling impeachment petitions. According to s...

item.title: Court Orders State to Compensate Ex-IEBC Official Sh3.1 Million Over Malicious Prosecution in Solar Lantern Tender
item.description: The High Court has ordered the government to pay former IEBC official Adan Katello Adano Sh3.1 million after ruling that he was maliciously prosecuted for nearly nine years over a Sh105 million solar ...

item.title: Tanzania Approves 2026/27 Mining Budget Focused on Critical Minerals and Industrial Growth
item.description: Tanzania Ministry of Minerals don present budget for the financial year 2026/27 worth TZS 174.98 billion, aiming to collect TZS 1.41 trillion revenue from mining sector. Mining contribution to GDP don...

item.title: India-Iran bilateral talks to focus on energy supply and Chabahar port operations
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar will host Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi on Friday for in-person bilateral discussions, marking their first meeting since the West Asia co...

item.title: Imran Khan's sisters and KP CM seek court-ordered meeting at Adiala Jail
item.description: On Tuesday, the sisters of PTI founder and former Prime Minister Imran Khan, along with Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi, were once again denied a visit to Imran at Adiala Jail. Aleema ...

item.title: Hacks Creators Discuss AI, Media, and Gender in Entertainment
item.description: Ahead of the finale of HBO Max's hit show Hacks, cocreators Paul W. Downs and Lucia Aniello discussed the challenges and themes explored in the series, emphasizing the importance of human creativity a...

item.title: IHC Seeks CDA Response on Lease Dispute Involving One Constitution Avenue Flat Owners and Bank of Punjab
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has formally issued notices to the Capital Development Authority (CDA) regarding appeals filed by apartment owners of One Constitution Avenue and the Bank of ...

item.title: UN Reports High Child Casualties Amid Escalating West Bank Violence
item.description: The United Nations has strongly condemned the rising death toll among children due to intensified Israeli military operations and settler attacks in the occupied West Bank, including East Jerusalem. S...

item.title: Efforts Continue to Locate Missing Thunder Bay Residents Near Abandoned Grain Elevators
item.description: Police and community members continue their search for Ashlynn Bottle, 23, and Nodin Skunk, 25, last seen on April 26 at the old Pool 8 grain elevator in Thunder Bay, Ontario. Both are members of Mish...

item.title: Trump confronts reporter questions on Iran war and impact on Americans
item.description: During a press briefing on Tuesday, former President Donald Trump lost his composure when reporters questioned him about the impact of his military actions in Iran on ordinary Americans. After emphasi...

item.title: Tanzania's Digital Procurement System Boosts Efficiency, Jobs, and Cost Savings
item.description: Tanzania imepiga hatua kubwa katika kuboresha mfumo wake wa ununuzi wa umma kwa kutumia teknolojia dijitali. Kuanzia mwaka 2023, Mamlaka ya Udhibiti wa Ununuzi wa Umma (PPRA) ilizindua Mfumo wa Taifa ...

item.title: Philippines Restricts Greek Animal Imports Due to Foot-and-Mouth Disease
item.description: The Department of Agriculture (DA) has announced a ban on imported live animals from Greece after the European country confirmed cases of foot-and-mouth disease in domestic sheep, particularly in Lesv...

item.title: Visayas Power Grid Faces Yellow Alert Due to High Demand and Plant Outages
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Visayas power grid was placed under a yellow alert for three hours yesterday after electricity reserves dipped below the required threshold. The National Grid Corp. of the Ph...

item.title: RSS conducts international outreach to address allegations over minority rights concerns
item.description: The Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS), a powerful Hindu nationalist organisation from which India’s ruling Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has ideological roots, has said it is engaging with foreign audi...

item.title: Discovery of Bicharracosaurus Dionidei Offers New Insights into Jurassic Sauropods
item.description: Paleontologists in Argentina have uncovered a new species of giant dinosaur, named Bicharracosaurus dionidei, providing fresh insights into Jurassic-era sauropods in the Southern Hemisphere. Measuring...

item.title: Health-focused climate messaging increases public support for government action
item.description: A recent international study by the Climate Opinion Research Exchange (Core), commissioned by the Wellcome Trust, shows that framing climate change as a health issue significantly boosts public concer...

item.title: Declining International Health Aid Poses Serious Challenges for Pakistan's Healthcare System
item.description: A recent report by think tank Tabadlab warns that Pakistan’s health sector is heading towards serious risks due to declining international aid. The study, titled 'Beyond Dependence: Understanding the ...

item.title: APC Screens Benue Assembly Aspirants, 59 Disqualified Over Document Issues
item.description: The Benue State chapter of APC don clear 86 aspirants and disqualify 59 people wey wan contest for the state House of Assembly primaries. This na result of screening wey the party House of Assembly Sc...

item.title: Ontario legislation restructures public water services, raising concerns over financialization and local accountability
item.description: In November 2025, the Ontario government enacted the Water and Wastewater Public Corporations Act (WCA) without public consultation, allowing provincial authorities to transfer local water and wastewa...
